creator: d.lohansky@zsupport.ru
text:
David Smith 脨驴脨赂脩聢脨碌脩聜:
> The patch to resolve bug:
>
> ports/121737: zabbix 1.4.4 with ipv6 doens't work correctly
>
> needs to be added to the zabbix-agent port as well as the zabbix port.
>
> Thanks
>
As I known, patch for 1.4.5 was passed to commiters several days ago. 
And will be commited soon.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122284
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=122285

My Bad. I answered to query-pr@ from another email.

1.4.5 really resolve issue with "ZBX_TCP_READ() failed [Interrupted 
system call]".

--
